title: nasturtium elongatum var. integrifolium
intro: Nasturtium elongatum var. integrifolium, also known as long-petaled nasturtium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is an annual herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Nasturtium elongatum var. integrifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in salads and as a garnish due to its peppery flavor and attractive flowers.
